claims.summary: PI accumulation can produce delayed correction and temporal lock-in.
claims.disposition: Verified actuator-aware anti-windup, saturation detection, partial decay, and hard clamps.

claims.summary: Integrator memory needs an explicit leak rather than an invisible permanent debt.
claims.disposition: Verified configurable integrator_leak and bounded runtime exposure.

claims.summary: Alternate pressure sources and regulator drive should be compared over time.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded read-only pressure-source/drive trace.

claims.summary: A pressure-relief pulse valve may release temporal lock-in.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because a pulse valve changes live controller actuation.
